prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A white cartoon duck with a sly dangerous grin, holding a shiny silver kitchen knife with dark wooden handle near its face. The blade has a single drop of red blood on the tip. Bold black ink outlines, comic-style hatching shadows. High contrast purple and silver lighting from below. Background of deep purple and lilac radial speed lines, clean composition, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只白色卡通鸭带着狡猾危险的坏笑，将一把闪亮银色厨房刀（深色木柄）举近脸旁。刀尖有一滴红血。粗黑墨水勾边，漫画风格排线阴影。高对比度紫色与银色光从下方打亮。背景为深紫与丁香放射线速度线，干净构图，无身体。

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up.
